Apple Inc. fiscal 2026 Q1 ended December 27, 2025.

Official source: Apple FY2026 Q1 consolidated financial statements PDF.
Source URL: https://www.apple.com/newsroom/pdfs/fy2026-q1/FY26_Q1_Consolidated_Financial_Statements.pdf

Net sales by category, USD millions:
- iPhone: 85,269
- Mac: 8,386
- iPad: 8,595
- Wearables, Home and Accessories: 11,493
- Services: 30,013
- Total net sales: 143,756

Geographic reportable segment rows, USD millions, should be excluded from Step 2 canonical product/category mapping:
- Americas: 58,529
- Europe: 38,146
- Greater China: 25,526
- Japan: 9,413
- Rest of Asia Pacific: 12,142

Consolidated operating income was 50,852 USD millions. Category-level operating income was not disclosed, so Step 2 structured rows should keep operating_income_usd_m as null and add validation warnings.
